associatedMedia.headline: 69158 Sir Dougal Campbell Laird of Auchinbreck Male LBPM-CL9 CHILDREN (3) LBPM-CL9
Saint Conan's Kirk, Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland

Kilchurn Castle was built in the mid-1400s, and it remained the base of the mighty Campbells of Glenorchy for 150 years. After the first Jacobite Rising of 1689, Kilchurn was converted into a garrison stronghold, but was abandoned by the end of the 1700s.

Kilchurn Castle, Loch Awe, Argyll, Scotland

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Dougal Campbell - Laird of Auchinbreck於1312年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍時，他的父親Sir Neil Campbell of Lochow54歲，母親Mary de Brus33歲。他於1330年之前與Mariot Margaret de Dundee在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1333年在他的家鄉享年21歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Dougal Campbell - Laird of Auchinbreck于1312年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍时，他的父亲Sir Neil Campbell of Lochow54岁，母亲Mary de Brus33岁。他于1330年之前与Mariot Margaret de Dundee在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1333年在他的家乡享年21岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Dougal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Dubhghall
meanings: Gaelic: from dubh ‘black, dark’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was a byname applied to Danes, in contrast to the fairer Norwegians and Icelanders ( compare Fionnghall ).

variants.name: Dugal
meanings: Gaelic: from dubh ‘black, dark’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was a byname applied to Danes, in contrast to the fairer Norwegians and Icelanders ( compare Fionnghall ).

variants.name: Dugald
meanings: Anglicized form of Dubhghall . The final -d is due to a mishearing of the Gaelic form, in which the final -ll sounds like -ld to English ears.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Dougal Campbell - Laird of Auchinbreck was born in 1312, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Sir Neil Campbell of Lochow, was 54 and his mother, Mary de Brus, was 33. He married Mariot Margaret de Dundee before 1330, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1333, in his hometown, at the age of 21, and was buried in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Dougal Campbell - Laird of Auchinbreck est né en 1312, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Sir Neil Campbell of Lochow, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Mary de Brus, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Mariot Margaret de Dundee avant 1330, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1333, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 21 ans, et a été enterré à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Dougal Campbell - Laird of Auchinbreck 1312 in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Neil Campbell of Lochow 54 und seine Mutter Mary de Brus 33. Er hat vor 1330 in Scotland Mariot Margaret de Dundee geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1333 im Alter von 21 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Dougal Campbell - Laird of Auchinbreck è nato il nel 1312 nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Neil Campbell of Lochow, aveva 54 anni e il suo madre, Mary de Brus, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Mariot Margaret de Dundee prima del 1330, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1333, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 21 anni, e fu sepolto a Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Dougal Campbell - Laird of Auchinbreckが1312年にスコットランドアルグイルロチャウで生まれた時，父Sir Neil Campbell of Lochowは54歳，母Mary de Brusは33歳であった。1330年以前にスコットランドでMariot Margaret de Dundeeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1333年に故郷で21歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルロチャウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Dougal Campbell - Laird of Auchinbreck(이)가 1312년 스컷랜드 아그이 럭아베에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Neil Campbell of Lochow(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary de Brus(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1330년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Mariot Margaret de Dundee(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1333년 그의 고향에서 21세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 럭아베에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Dougal Campbell - Laird of Auchinbreck nasceu em 1312, em Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Neil Campbell of Lochow, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Brus, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Mariot Margaret de Dundee antes 1330, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1333, em sua cidade natal, com 21 anos, e foi sepultado em Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Dougal Campbell - Laird of Auchinbreck родился в 1312 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Neil Campbell of Lochow было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Mary de Brus, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Mariot Margaret de Dundee перед 1330 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1333 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 21 год и был похоронен в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Dougal Campbell - Laird of Auchinbreck nació en 1312, en Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Sir Neil Campbell of Lochow, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Mary de Brus, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Mariot Margaret de Dundee antes de 1330, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1333, en su pueblo, a la edad de 21 años, y fue sepultado en Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland.
